_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: the protein expression of NF1 was significantly downregulated in NFFs compared with that in HEFs
details: Successfully detected significantly downregulated NF1 protein expression in NFFs compared to HEFs by western blot
